problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
